title: WALLET
subtitle: Balance, frozen funds, reward ledger and withdrawal requests in one customer-safe billing surface.

errors.partialDescription: The page keeps usable sections visible while the unavailable backend resource recovers.

recentPayments.title: Recent payments
recentPayments.description: A safe payment snapshot scoped to the signed-in customer. Raw provider identifiers, checkout URLs and provider payloads stay out of the wallet UI.

withdrawForm.title: Request payout
withdrawForm.description: Create a withdrawal request for operations review. Provider limits and compliance checks may apply before funds move.
withdrawForm.notice: Do not send wallet addresses or payment credentials here unless the backend explicitly requests them. Sensitive payout details are handled in the approved support channel.

errors.balance: The withdrawal amount cannot exceed the available balance.
errors.submit: Withdrawal request failed. Try again or contact support if the balance changed unexpectedly.

withdrawForm.success: Withdrawal request submitted. The wallet ledger will refresh automatically.

withdrawals.title: Withdrawal status
withdrawals.description: No wallet movements have been created yet.

transactions.title: Wallet transactions
transactions.empty: No wallet transactions match this filter.
